summary: Vendored API security plane: ALE, ECDSA request signing, JWT bearer auth, PBKDF2 hashing, envelope encryption, RLS, rate limiting.
userSteps: Set CONNECTION_STRINGS_DEFAULT to your PostgreSQL instance (docker compose up starts one).
Generate secrets with `ctx0 keygen` and set the printed CTX_ALE_*, CTX_JWT_* and CTX_ENVELOPE_* variables via the environment.
